nasb.text: Now in all Israel was no one as handsome as Absalom, so highly praised; from the sole of his foot to the crown of his head there was no defect in him.

esv.text: Now in all Israel there was no one so much to be praised for his handsome appearance as Absalom. From the sole of his foot to the crown of his head there was no blemish in him.

cnv.text: 在全以色列中，沒有一個人像押沙龍那樣英俊，得人稱讚，從腳底到頭頂，都沒有一點缺陷。

ccb.text: 在整个以色列，没有人像押沙龙那样因相貌英俊而为人称道，他从头到脚毫无瑕疵。
